create_form_description: Add a new embeddable form tied to a project
name: Name
slug_help: Lowercase kebab-case identifier (a-z, 0-9, hyphens). Immutable after creation.
slug_invalid: Slug must be 1..50 chars, lowercase kebab-case (a-z, 0-9, hyphens)
secret_token_help: Server-generated credential used in the public endpoint URL. Shown only once — cannot be changed after creation.
disable_confirm_description: "{{name}}" will stop accepting new submissions until re-enabled.
allowed_origins_help: Restrict submissions to specific host sites (e.g. https://example.com). Leave empty to accept submissions from any site.
allowed_origins_empty_warning: No restrictions — anyone can submit to this form.
allowed_origins_snippet_warning_body: This form is restricted to {{count}} allowed origin(s). Submissions from any other origin will be rejected.
snippet_description: Paste this tag into your customer's website to render the form.
snippet_help: The snippet is a self-contained <form> tag that POSTs directly to the endpoint. Style the fields inside the <form> as you wish.
confirm_delete_description: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? All submissions will also be deleted. This cannot be undone.
project_section_forms_empty: No forms yet. Create one to start collecting submissions.
submission_thanks: Thank you! Your message has been received.
